'''旧暦5月2日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[713年]]_月_日） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（[[718年]]_月_日） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建保]]元年（[[1213年]]_月_日） - [[和田会戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に鎌倉幕府を攻撃。翌日由比ヶ浜で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8年（[[756年]]_月_日） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]] * [[長徳]]元年（[[995年]]_月_日） - [[藤原道綱の母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者 * [[天正]]11年（[[1583年]]_月_日） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月1日 (旧暦)|5月1日]] 翌日[[5月3日 (旧暦)|5月3日]] - 前月[[4月2日 (旧暦)|4月2日]] 翌月[[6月2日 (旧暦)|6月2日]] *新暦[[5月2日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8年（[[756年]]_月_日） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]] * [[長徳]]元年（[[995年]]_月_日） - [[藤原道綱の母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者 * [[天正]]11年（[[1583年]]_月_日） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）

{{stub}}

== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}
[[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]]

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月2日'''（きゅうれきごがつふつか）は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）

== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]{{要出典|date=2021-03}}、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月2日'''（きゅうれきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月2日'''（きゅうれきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated qqs front]]<!----->[[Category:deprecated qqs back]] [[Category:deprecated qqs front]]<!--5月2日 (旧暦)-->[[Category:deprecated qqs back]] [[Category:kk]][[en:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]][[en:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]][[en:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[sn:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:ppp]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:旧暦May]][[sn:May 2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]]

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月2日'''（きゅうれきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）

{{Lunar May}} '''Lunar May2日'''（きゅうれきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）

'''May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 2'''<!--Lunar May2-->きゅうれきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。

== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）

'''May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 2'''<!--Lunar May2-->きゅうれきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 2'''<!--Lunar May2-->きゅうれきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== Births == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 2'''<!--Lunar May2れきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== Births == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}}) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}}, {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}}, {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}}, and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}}) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}}, {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}}; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}}, his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}}, a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|天平勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}}, the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}}). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}}, author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}}?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}}, a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}}).
[[Category:New Pages]][[ja:年表]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}}) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}}, {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}}, {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}}, and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}}) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}}, {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}}; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}}, his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}}, a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|天平勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}}, the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}}). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}}, author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}}?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}}, a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}}).
[[Category:New Pages]][[ja:年表]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}}) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}}, {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}}, {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}}, and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}}) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}}, {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}}; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}}, his entire clan was annihilated.

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}}) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}}, {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}}, {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}}, and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}}) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}}, {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}}; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}}, his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}}, a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}}, the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}}). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}}, author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}}?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}}, a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}}).
[[Category:New Pages]][[ja:年表]]

[[sn:May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[May 2 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

[[sn:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} qqth Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} qqth Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

[[sn:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701年}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713年}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213年}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995年}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583年}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558年}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year }} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year }} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756年}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year }} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936年}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year }} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year }} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year }} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year }} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year }} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year }} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year }} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year }} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

[[sn:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year }} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year }} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year }} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year }} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year }} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year }} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]

[[sn:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year }} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year }} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year }} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year }} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year }} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year }} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year }} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year }} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year }} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year }} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year }} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year }} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

[[sn:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year }} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year }} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year }} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year }} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year }} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year }} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[zh:五月初二]] [[en:draft:May 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year }} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year }} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year }} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year }} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year }} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year }} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year }} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year }} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year }} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year }} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year }} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year }} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year }} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year }} ).

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記|12=draft}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日|12=draft}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国|12=draft}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国|12=draft}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国|12=draft}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=draft}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛|12=draft}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時|12=draft}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜|12=draft}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋|12=draft}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|12=draft}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母|12=draft}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記|12=draft}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝|12=draft}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]]
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記|12=draft|12=draft}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国|12=draft|12=draft}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛|12=draft|12=draft}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時|12=draft|12=draft}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜|12=draft|12=draft}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋|12=draft|12=draft}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母|12=draft|12=draft}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記|12=draft|12=draft}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記|12=draft|12=draft}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国|12=draft|12=draft}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛|12=draft|12=draft}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時|12=draft|12=draft}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜|12=draft|12=draft}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋|12=draft|12=draft}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母|12=draft|12=draft}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記|12=draft|12=draft}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|713 AD|ja|713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|ja|風土記|12=draft|12=draft}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|718 AD|ja|718th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|ja|能登国|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Ishikuni Province|ja|石城国|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Ishikose Province|ja|石背国|12=draft|12=draft}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|ja|建暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1213 AD|ja|1213rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 23|ja|5月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛|12=draft|12=draft}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hojo Yoshitoki|ja|北条義時|12=draft|12=draft}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|ja|由比ヶ浜|12=draft|12=draft}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1599 AD|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhira|ja|近衛信尋|12=draft|12=draft}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649 AD|ja|1649th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|756 AD|ja|756th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 4|ja|6月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701 AD|ja|701st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|ja|長徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|995 AD|ja|995th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 2|ja|6月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|ja|藤原道綱母|12=draft|12=draft}} , author of the {{ill|Chōryō Nikki|ja|蜻蛉日記|12=draft|12=draft}} (born circa {{ill|936 AD|ja|936th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1583 AD|ja|1583rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|ja|織田信孝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1558 AD|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月2日'''（きゅうれきごがつふつか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[713年]][[5月30日]]） - [[元明天皇]]が諸国に[[風土記]]の編纂を命じる * [[養老]]2年（ユリウス暦[[718年]][[6月4日]]） - [[能登国]]・[[安房国]]・[[石城国]]・[[石背国]]の4国を設置 * [[建暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月23日]]） - [[和田合戦]]。[[和田義盛]]が[[北条義時]]を討つ為に[[鎌倉幕府]]を攻撃。翌日[[由比ヶ浜]]で一族ともに全滅
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1599年]][[6月24日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公家]]（+ [[1649年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平勝宝]]8歳（ユリウス暦[[756年]][[6月4日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]、45代[[天皇]]（* [[701年]]） * [[長徳]]元年（ユリウス暦[[995年]][[6月2日]]） - [[藤原道綱母]]、『[[蜻蛉日記]]』著者（* [[936年]]？） * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[6月21日]]） - [[織田信孝]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の三男（* [[1558年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[5月2日 (旧暦)]] to [[May 2 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
