revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|May 2|qq=May 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 6th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:713|713 AD]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the [[:en:Fudoki|Fudoki]] in various provinces. * [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:718|718 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – The four countries of [[:en:Noto Province|Noto Province]] , [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , [[:en:Iwaki Province (718)|Ishikuni Province]] , and [[:en:Iwase Province|Ishikose Province]] were established. * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenryaku]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213 AD]] [[:en:May 23|May 23]] ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|qq=}} , [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]] attacked the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] in order to defeat [[:en:Hōjō Yoshitoki|Hojo Yoshitoki]] ; the following day, at [[:en:Yuigahama|Yuigahama]] , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839604]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 2|qq=May 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 6th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:713|713 AD]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the [[:en:Fudoki|Fudoki]] in various provinces. * [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:718|718 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – The four countries of [[:en:Noto Province|Noto Province]] , [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , [[:en:Iwaki Province (718)|Ishikuni Province]] , and [[:en:Iwase Province|Ishikose Province]] were established. * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenryaku]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213 AD]] [[:en:May 23|May 23]] ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|qq=|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]] attacked the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] in order to defeat [[:en:Hōjō Yoshitoki|Hojo Yoshitoki]] ; the following day, at [[:en:Yuigahama|Yuigahama]] , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502|qq=}}

revision.comment: Bot: categorize based on Wikidata P11250 property
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839604]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 2|qq=May 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 6th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:713|713 AD]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the [[:en:Fudoki|Fudoki]] in various provinces. * [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:718|718 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – The four countries of [[:en:Noto Province|Noto Province]] , [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , [[:en:Iwaki Province (718)|Ishikuni Province]] , and [[:en:Iwase Province|Ishikose Province]] were established. * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenryaku]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213 AD]] [[:en:May 23|May 23]] ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|qq=|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]] attacked the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] in order to defeat [[:en:Hōjō Yoshitoki|Hojo Yoshitoki]] ; the following day, at [[:en:Yuigahama|Yuigahama]] , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839604]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 2|qq=May 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 6th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:713|713 AD]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the [[:en:Fudoki|Fudoki]] in various provinces. * [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:718|718 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – The four countries of [[:en:Noto Province|Noto Province]] , [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , [[:en:Iwaki Province (718)|Ishikuni Province]] , and [[:en:Iwase Province|Ishikose Province]] were established. * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenryaku]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213 AD]] [[:en:May 23|May 23]] ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|qq=|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]] attacked the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] in order to defeat [[:en:Hōjō Yoshitoki|Hojo Yoshitoki]] ; the following day, at [[:en:Yuigahama|Yuigahama]] , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).

== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839604]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 2|qq=May 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 6th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:713|713 AD]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the [[:en:Fudoki|Fudoki]] in various provinces. * [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:718|718 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – The four countries of [[:en:Noto Province|Noto Province]] , [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , [[:en:Iwaki Province (718)|Ishikuni Province]] , and [[:en:Iwase Province|Ishikose Province]] were established. * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenryaku]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213 AD]] [[:en:May 23|May 23]] ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]] attacked the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] in order to defeat [[:en:Hōjō Yoshitoki|Hojo Yoshitoki]] ; the following day, at [[:en:Yuigahama|Yuigahama]] , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]]
{{translated page|ja|5月2日 (旧暦)|version=99375029|comment=Imported full ja history}}

}}

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初二]] {{wikidata link|Q839604}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839604]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 2|qq=May 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 6th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:713|713 AD]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the [[:en:Fudoki|Fudoki]] in various provinces. * [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:718|718 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – The four countries of [[:en:Noto Province|Noto Province]] , [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , [[:en:Iwaki Province (718)|Ishikuni Province]] , and [[:en:Iwase Province|Ishikose Province]] were established. * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenryaku]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213 AD]] [[:en:May 23|May 23]] ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]] attacked the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] in order to defeat [[:en:Hōjō Yoshitoki|Hojo Yoshitoki]] ; the following day, at [[:en:Yuigahama|Yuigahama]] , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839604]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 2|qq=May 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 6th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:713|713 AD]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the [[:en:Fudoki|Fudoki]] in various provinces. * [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:718|718 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – The four countries of [[:en:Noto Province|Noto Province]] , [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , [[:en:Iwaki Province (718)|Ishikuni Province]] , and [[:en:Iwase Province|Ishikose Province]] were established. * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenryaku]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213 AD]] [[:en:May 23|May 23]] ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]] attacked the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] in order to defeat [[:en:Hōjō Yoshitoki|Hojo Yoshitoki]] ; the following day, at [[:en:Yuigahama|Yuigahama]] , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 6th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:713|713 AD]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the [[:en:Fudoki|Fudoki]] in various provinces. * [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:718|718 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – The four countries of [[:en:Noto Province|Noto Province]] , [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , [[:en:Iwaki Province (718)|Ishikuni Province]] , and [[:en:Iwase Province|Ishikose Province]] were established. * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenryaku]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213 AD]] [[:en:May 23|May 23]] ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]] attacked the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] in order to defeat [[:en:Hōjō Yoshitoki|Hojo Yoshitoki]] ; the following day, at [[:en:Yuigahama|Yuigahama]] , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599 AD]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhira]] , a court noble (died [[:en:1649|1649 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:756|756 AD]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] , the 45th Emperor (born [[:en:701|701 AD]] ). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995 AD]] [[:en:June 2|June 2]] ) – [[:en:Michitsuna's mother|Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto]] , author of the [[:en:Kagerō Nikki|Chōryō Nikki]] (born circa [[:en:936|936 AD]] ?). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583 AD]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]] ) – [[:en:Oda Nobutaka|Oda Nobutaka]] , a military commander and the third son of [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] (born [[:en:1558|1558 AD]] ).
== See Also ==

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|713|en|713|WD=Q23523|lt=713 AD}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|WD=Q2590|lt=May 30}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|en|Fudoki|WD=Q1194534|lt=Fudoki}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|718|en|718|WD=Q23534|lt=718 AD}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|en|Noto Province|WD=Q1047671|lt=Noto Province}} , {{ill|Awa Province (Chiba)|en|Awa Province (Chiba)|WD=Q1053044|lt=Awa Province}} , {{ill|Iwaki Province (718)|en|Iwaki Province (718)|WD=Q1192809|lt=Ishikuni Province}} , and {{ill|Iwase Province|en|Iwase Province|WD=Q1166897|lt=Ishikose Province}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|WD=Q1194260|lt=Kenryaku}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|WD=Q5261|lt=1213 AD}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|WD=Q2583|lt=May 23}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|WD=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hōjō Yoshitoki|en|Hōjō Yoshitoki|WD=Q1028811|lt=Hojo Yoshitoki}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|en|Yuigahama|WD=Q8060490|lt=Yuigahama}} , his entire clan was annihilated.

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|713|en|713|WD=Q23523|lt=713 AD}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|WD=Q2590|lt=May 30}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|en|Fudoki|WD=Q1194534|lt=Fudoki}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|718|en|718|WD=Q23534|lt=718 AD}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|en|Noto Province|WD=Q1047671|lt=Noto Province}} , {{ill|Awa Province (Chiba)|en|Awa Province (Chiba)|WD=Q1053044|lt=Awa Province}} , {{ill|Iwaki Province (718)|en|Iwaki Province (718)|WD=Q1192809|lt=Ishikuni Province}} , and {{ill|Iwase Province|en|Iwase Province|WD=Q1166897|lt=Ishikose Province}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|WD=Q1194260|lt=Kenryaku}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|WD=Q5261|lt=1213 AD}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|WD=Q2583|lt=May 23}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|WD=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hōjō Yoshitoki|en|Hōjō Yoshitoki|WD=Q1028811|lt=Hojo Yoshitoki}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|en|Yuigahama|WD=Q8060490|lt=Yuigahama}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599 AD}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|en|Konoe Nobuhiro|WD=Q923621|lt=Konoe Nobuhira}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649|en|1649|WD=Q6945|lt=1649 AD}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|756|en|756|WD=Q31121|lt=756 AD}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701|en|701|WD=Q23496|lt=701 AD}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|WD=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|995|en|995|WD=Q23794|lt=995 AD}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|WD=Q2624|lt=June 2}} ) – {{ill|Michitsuna's mother|en|Michitsuna's mother|WD=Q439829|lt=Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto}} , author of the {{ill|Kagerō Nikki|en|Kagerō Nikki|WD=Q3005729|lt=Chōryō Nikki}} (born circa {{ill|936|en|936|WD=Q23584|lt=936 AD}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1583|en|1583|WD=Q6726|lt=1583 AD}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|en|Oda Nobutaka|WD=Q2614349|lt=Oda Nobutaka}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} (born {{ill|1558|en|1558|WD=Q6601|lt=1558 AD}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初二]][[zh:五月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 2|qq=May 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|713|en|713|WD=Q23523|lt=713 AD}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|WD=Q2590|lt=May 30}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|en|Fudoki|WD=Q1194534|lt=Fudoki}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|718|en|718|WD=Q23534|lt=718 AD}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|en|Noto Province|WD=Q1047671|lt=Noto Province}} , {{ill|Awa Province (Chiba)|en|Awa Province (Chiba)|WD=Q1053044|lt=Awa Province}} , {{ill|Iwaki Province (718)|en|Iwaki Province (718)|WD=Q1192809|lt=Ishikuni Province}} , and {{ill|Iwase Province|en|Iwase Province|WD=Q1166897|lt=Ishikose Province}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|WD=Q1194260|lt=Kenryaku}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|WD=Q5261|lt=1213 AD}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|WD=Q2583|lt=May 23}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|WD=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hōjō Yoshitoki|en|Hōjō Yoshitoki|WD=Q1028811|lt=Hojo Yoshitoki}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|en|Yuigahama|WD=Q8060490|lt=Yuigahama}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599 AD}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|en|Konoe Nobuhiro|WD=Q923621|lt=Konoe Nobuhira}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649|en|1649|WD=Q6945|lt=1649 AD}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|756|en|756|WD=Q31121|lt=756 AD}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701|en|701|WD=Q23496|lt=701 AD}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|WD=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|995|en|995|WD=Q23794|lt=995 AD}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|WD=Q2624|lt=June 2}} ) – {{ill|Michitsuna's mother|en|Michitsuna's mother|WD=Q439829|lt=Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto}} , author of the {{ill|Kagerō Nikki|en|Kagerō Nikki|WD=Q3005729|lt=Chōryō Nikki}} (born circa {{ill|936|en|936|WD=Q23584|lt=936 AD}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1583|en|1583|WD=Q6726|lt=1583 AD}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|en|Oda Nobutaka|WD=Q2614349|lt=Oda Nobutaka}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} (born {{ill|1558|en|1558|WD=Q6601|lt=1558 AD}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|1|5|3|4|2|6|5|0502|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|713|en|713|WD=Q23523|lt=713 AD|1=713}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|WD=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|en|Fudoki|WD=Q1194534|lt=Fudoki|1=Fudoki}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|718|en|718|WD=Q23534|lt=718 AD|1=718}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|en|Noto Province|WD=Q1047671|lt=Noto Province|1=Noto Province}} , {{ill|Awa Province (Chiba)|en|Awa Province (Chiba)|WD=Q1053044|lt=Awa Province|1=Awa Province (Chiba)}} , {{ill|Iwaki Province (718)|en|Iwaki Province (718)|WD=Q1192809|lt=Ishikuni Province|1=Iwaki Province (718)}} , and {{ill|Iwase Province|en|Iwase Province|WD=Q1166897|lt=Ishikose Province|1=Iwase Province}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|WD=Q1194260|lt=Kenryaku|1=Kenryaku}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|WD=Q5261|lt=1213 AD|1=1213}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|WD=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11417941}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|WD=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori|1=Wada Yoshimori}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hōjō Yoshitoki|en|Hōjō Yoshitoki|WD=Q1028811|lt=Hojo Yoshitoki|1=Hōjō Yoshitoki}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|en|Yuigahama|WD=Q8060490|lt=Yuigahama|1=Yuigahama}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599 AD|1=1599}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24|1=June 24}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|en|Konoe Nobuhiro|WD=Q923621|lt=Konoe Nobuhira|1=Konoe Nobuhiro}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649|en|1649|WD=Q6945|lt=1649 AD|1=1649}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373169}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|756|en|756|WD=Q31121|lt=756 AD|1=756}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701|en|701|WD=Q23496|lt=701 AD|1=701}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|WD=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|995|en|995|WD=Q23794|lt=995 AD|1=995}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|WD=Q2624|lt=June 2|1=June 2}} ) – {{ill|Michitsuna's mother|en|Michitsuna's mother|WD=Q439829|lt=Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|1=Michitsuna's mother}} , author of the {{ill|Kagerō Nikki|en|Kagerō Nikki|WD=Q3005729|lt=Chōryō Nikki|1=Kagerō Nikki}} (born circa {{ill|936|en|936|WD=Q23584|lt=936 AD|1=936}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1583|en|1583|WD=Q6726|lt=1583 AD|1=1583}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21|1=June 21}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|en|Oda Nobutaka|WD=Q2614349|lt=Oda Nobutaka|1=Oda Nobutaka}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} (born {{ill|1558|en|1558|WD=Q6601|lt=1558 AD|1=1558}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|qid=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|713|en|713|qid=Q23523|lt=713 AD|1=713}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|qid=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered the compilation of the {{ill|Fudoki|en|Fudoki|qid=Q1194534|lt=Fudoki|1=Fudoki}} in various provinces. * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|qid=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|718|en|718|qid=Q23534|lt=718 AD|1=718}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|qid=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}} ) – The four countries of {{ill|Noto Province|en|Noto Province|qid=Q1047671|lt=Noto Province|1=Noto Province}} , {{ill|Awa Province (Chiba)|en|Awa Province (Chiba)|qid=Q1053044|lt=Awa Province|1=Awa Province (Chiba)}} , {{ill|Iwaki Province (718)|en|Iwaki Province (718)|qid=Q1192809|lt=Ishikuni Province|1=Iwaki Province (718)}} , and {{ill|Iwase Province|en|Iwase Province|qid=Q1166897|lt=Ishikose Province|1=Iwase Province}} were established. * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|qid=Q1194260|lt=Kenryaku|1=Kenryaku}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|qid=Q5261|lt=1213 AD|1=1213}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}} ) – In the {{ill|Wada War|ja|和田合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada War|1=Wada Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11417941}} , {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|qid=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori|1=Wada Yoshimori}} attacked the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} in order to defeat {{ill|Hōjō Yoshitoki|en|Hōjō Yoshitoki|qid=Q1028811|lt=Hojo Yoshitoki|1=Hōjō Yoshitoki}} ; the following day, at {{ill|Yuigahama|en|Yuigahama|qid=Q8060490|lt=Yuigahama|1=Yuigahama}} , his entire clan was annihilated.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1599|en|1599|qid=Q6803|lt=1599 AD|1=1599}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|qid=Q2665|lt=June 24|1=June 24}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|en|Konoe Nobuhiro|qid=Q923621|lt=Konoe Nobuhira|1=Konoe Nobuhiro}} , a court noble (died {{ill|1649|en|1649|qid=Q6945|lt=1649 AD|1=1649}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennpyō Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpyō Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373169}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|756|en|756|qid=Q31121|lt=756 AD|1=756}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|qid=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} , the 45th Emperor (born {{ill|701|en|701|qid=Q23496|lt=701 AD|1=701}} ). * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|qid=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|995|en|995|qid=Q23794|lt=995 AD|1=995}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|qid=Q2624|lt=June 2|1=June 2}} ) – {{ill|Michitsuna's mother|en|Michitsuna's mother|qid=Q439829|lt=Fujiwara no Michitsunemoto|1=Michitsuna's mother}} , author of the {{ill|Kagerō Nikki|en|Kagerō Nikki|qid=Q3005729|lt=Chōryō Nikki|1=Kagerō Nikki}} (born circa {{ill|936|en|936|qid=Q23584|lt=936 AD|1=936}} ?). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1583|en|1583|qid=Q6726|lt=1583 AD|1=1583}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|qid=Q2671|lt=June 21|1=June 21}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobutaka|en|Oda Nobutaka|qid=Q2614349|lt=Oda Nobutaka|1=Oda Nobutaka}} , a military commander and the third son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} (born {{ill|1558|en|1558|qid=Q6601|lt=1558 AD|1=1558}} ).
